page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 1.0 thread per core, providing 48 vCPUs with dedicated CPU allocation.

This instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 25 Gbps.

The dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density position this instance as a memory-optimized resource. The absence of local NVMe storage and hardware accelerators represents a design tradeoff, focusing resources entirely on memory capacity and dedicated CPU execution. This configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring large memory footprints without the overhead of local storage maintenance.

The ecs.r9i.12xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads. Suitable applications include in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing tasks.

This memory-optimized profile makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive applications such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise data processing.
